preview_text:
The model favors Ivory Coast at 63%, with Curaçao offered just 12% to win. The underdog's path to victory remains unlikely under the forecast, though not negligible.

The 24.8% draw probability suggests a competitive match within reasonable margins. Ivory Coast's 39-point edge over Curaçao in win probability indicates clear separation, yet the draw likelihood signals the teams are not drastically mismatched in expected performance. A narrow result is plausible.

The market diverges noticeably from the model. Sportsbooks price Ivory Coast at 84%, some 20 percentage points higher than the model's 63%, while compressing both Curaçao and draw odds substantially. Polymarket prices align closely with the book consensus, showing a marked preference for an Ivory Coast victory. The dashboard does not adjudicate which source better reflects true match probability, only that meaningful disagreement exists on the magnitude of the favorite's advantage.
